output.level_rationale: Role title is Manager with Strategy & Programs scope, indicating individual-contributor or first-level management in a strategic function. No reporting line, team size, or years-of-experience requirement stated in JD; company stage is unknown. Mapped conservatively to L4 based on manager title and strategic program ownership, typical for mid-level operations and strategy roles.
output.summary: Candidate has relevant Strategy & Operations and transformation program background from Google, with eight years of scaling commercial operations and cross-functional program delivery. However, the JD is severely truncated (appears to be a cached snapshot with mostly website boilerplate HTML and no substantive role description, requirements, or domain context), making it impossible to assess specific AV domain expertise, stakeholder scope, ownership boundaries, or whether this is a first-time management role or individual-contributor track. Strong gaps remain in AV industry experience, specific autonomous-vehicle business strategy exposure, and clarity on actual role scope. Recommend awaiting a complete, readable JD before further evaluation.
uncertainties: Role JD appears to be a corrupted or incomplete fetch (mostly HTML/boilerplate); actual responsibilities and requirements are not legible
Company size, stage, and AV strategy maturity (research vs. commercialization) are unknown
Reporting line, team size, and seniority anchors not stated in available JD text
